ham.subject: Scheduled Server Upgrade – 2nd April 2026 02:00 AM BST
ham.body:
Dear All,

Please note the upcoming maintenance window for the Acme ERP system scheduled on 2nd April 2026 from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM BST. During this period, the system will be inaccessible. All users should save their work and log out before the start time.

If you have any questions, contact the IT Helpdesk at helpdesk@example.com.

Thank you,
Acme IT Services

spam.subject: URGENT: Tax Collection Notice
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Our records indicate that your Canada Revenue Agency account has an outstanding balance of CAD 12,345.00 for the year 2025. Failure to settle within 48 hours will result in account suspension and potential legal action.

To avoid penalties, verify your account details now: <URL>

Sincerely,
Surest Tax Services
Compliance Team
